# FINA — Technical Documentation

> Auto-generated by codebase analysis on 2026-04-05

---

## 1. Overview

**FINA** is a comprehensive Windows desktop ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) and accounting system targeting Georgian businesses. It manages the full lifecycle of inventory, trade, accounting, payroll, hospitality, POS (point-of-sale), and regulatory compliance operations. The system integrates directly with Georgian government tax and waybill web services (Revenue Service RS.ge, Ministry of Finance NTOS, Pension Agency) and provides multi-company, multi-store, multi-currency capabilities for retail, wholesale, café/restaurant, hotel, medical, and auto-service verticals.

---

## 2. Tech Stack

| Category | Technology | Version / Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Language | C# | 7.3 (LangVersion in project files) |
| Framework | .NET Framework (Windows Forms) | 4.8 (`TargetFrameworkVersion v4.8`) |
| ORM / Data Access | Raw ADO.NET (`System.Data.SqlClient`) | No ORM — hand-written SQL throughout `DBContext.cs` and `DataManager.cs` |
| Primary Database | Microsoft SQL Server | Connection string via `StaticFields.ConnectionString`; SQL Server 2012+ features used |
| Secondary Database | MySQL (optional web sync) | `MySql.Data.dll` in DLL folder; `MySqlDataManager.cs` |
| JSON Serialization | Newtonsoft.Json | 6.0.0.0 (referenced in `ipmControls.csproj` and `ipmPMBasic.csproj`) |
| Excel Export | Microsoft.Office.Interop.Excel / SpreadsheetGear | Interop 15.0; SpreadsheetGear 6.0.3.151 |
| PDF | PdfLib | Custom `PdfLib.dll` in DLL folder |
| Barcode | Zen.Barcode.Core | 3.1.0.0 |
| Compression | ICSharpCode.SharpZipLib / Ionic.Zip | SharpZipLib 0.85.5.452; Ionic.Zip |
| Cryptography | BouncyCastle.Crypto / AES (BCL) | BouncyCastle 1.8.1.0; `CryptoSecurityCore.cs` uses AES-256-CBC |
| SSH / SFTP | Renci.SshNet | `AdditionalAdvancedProjects` |
| Email | OpenPop | 2.0.4.369 (POP3 email in `ipmSync`) |
| WebSocket | websocket-sharp-standard | `ipmCashierPrinter` — Tinda fiscal device communication |
| HTTP Client | `System.Net.Http.HttpClient` / `HttpWebRequest` | `ApiInvoker.cs`, `ServiceRESTManager.cs`, `RestFulManager.cs` |
| WCF SOAP Client | `System.ServiceModel` (BasicHttpBinding) | `RSService.cs` — RS.ge and MOF ASMX endpoints |
| Containerization | None detected | Desktop application, no Docker/Kubernetes |
| CI/CD | None detected | No pipeline files found |
| Testing | None detected | No test projects found in the solution |
| Observability | Windows Event Log + File Log | `LogHelper.cs` writes to Windows Event Log with fallback to `ProgramLog.txt` |
| Licensing | Custom HTTP license server | `license.fina.ge:64270` via `LicenseManager.cs` |
| Hardware ID | WMI (`WMI.cs`) | Hardware fingerprint for license binding |

## 3. Solution Structure

The solution file is `WareHouseMain\WareHouseMain.sln`. It contains **50+ projects** split across two root directories:

### `iPoint Modules\` — Shared/Foundation Libraries

| Project | Assembly | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `Test2\FINA.csproj` | `FINA.exe` | **Entry point** — WinExe, `Program.cs`, `MainForm.cs`, `ProgramManager.cs` |
| `ipmPMBasic\` | `ipmPMBasic.dll` | Core engine: `ProgramManagerBasic`, `DataManager`, `DBContext`, `MySqlDataManager`, `CurrencyManager`, `TranslatorManager`, `RSService`, `LicenseManager`, `ApiInvoker`, all domain model classes (`Models/book.*`, `Models/doc.*`) |
| `ipmControls\` | `ipmControls.dll` | Reusable UI controls: login forms, calculator, account selector, custom DataGridView columns, progress dispatcher, message box forms |
| `ipmElementForms\` | `ipmElementForms.dll` | CRUD "element" forms for all master data entities (products, stores, users, currencies, staff positions, hotel rooms, café tables, etc.) |
| `ipmElementList\` | `ipmElementList.dll` | Base list/journal/view forms: `ipmBaseDocForm`, `ipmBaseViewForm`, `ipmBaseElementForm`, advanced filter forms, payment forms, Excel/PDF export list forms |

## 4. Architecture

### 4.1 Architectural Style

**N-tier Layered / Modular Monolith — Windows Desktop Application**

The application is a single deployable `.exe` (`FINA.exe`) that loads all functionality from a large set of co-deployed class library DLLs. There is no microservice boundary, no web tier, and no message broker. Code is organized into a clear layered model but all layers execute in-process within the same Windows Forms application context.

The build version in `ProgramManagerBasic.cs` is `4054`, with a build datetime of `2024-01-08`, confirming active development. Conditional compilation symbols (`_FREE_VERSION`, `_EXPORT_VERSION`, `_FINA24_VERSION`) appear throughout source files to enable different product editions from the same codebase.

### 4.2 Layer / Slice Breakdown

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Presentation Layer (Windows Forms)                                  │
│  FINA.exe (MainForm, ProgramManager)                                │
│  ipmDocs/* forms, ipmViews/* forms, ipmElementForms, ipmElementList │
│  ipmSuperMarket, ipmCafe, ipmHotelForm, ipmMedical, ipmAutoService  │
│  ipmAccesses, ipmExtraFunctions, ipmBanking, ipmWarehouse, ipmCRM   │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Application / Orchestration Layer                                   │
│  ProgramManager (FINA project) — module routing, MDI child control  │
│  ipmBLogic (BusinessLogic, BusinesContext) — transactional writes   │
│  ipmSync (SyncModule) — data sync orchestration                     │
│  ipmReportGenerator (ReportGenerator) — report rendering engine     │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Domain / Core Layer                                                 │
│  ipmPMBasic — ProgramManagerBasic, DataManager, DBContext           │
│               Models (book.*, doc.*, config.*) — plain C# classes   │
│               CurrencyManager, TranslatorManager, LicenseManager    │
│               RSService (Georgian tax authority integration)         │
│               ApiInvoker, ServiceRESTManager — HTTP abstraction      │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Infrastructure / Cross-Cutting Layer                                │
│  ipmStaticHelper — StaticFields, LogHelper, StaticFuncs, APIEndpoints│
│  ipmDatabaseGenerater — DB connection setup and bootstrapping        │
│  ipmCashierPrinter — Hardware device abstraction (fiscal, POS, etc.)│
│  DLL/ folder — pre-compiled third-party assemblies                  │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Module navigation** is driven by `ProgramManager`, which raises `OnShowListForm` and `OnShowOtherForm` events (Observer pattern). `MainForm` handles these events and loads the appropriate MDI child form.

### 4.3 Communication Patterns

**Synchronous — Internal (in-process)**
- All business logic is invoked synchronously via direct method calls between assemblies.
- The MDI pattern in `MainForm` controls which form is displayed; `ProgramManager` passes itself as a dependency to all child forms.

**Synchronous — External (HTTP/REST)**
- `ApiInvoker.cs` (`ipmPMBasic`) — universal async/sync HTTP client wrapping `HttpClient`. Used by `LicenseManager`, `CurrencyManager` (NBG API), and others.
- `ServiceRESTManager.cs` — `HttpWebRequest`-based REST client used for POS sync with a local `PosService.svc` WCF endpoint.
- `RestFulManager.cs` — Legacy `HttpWebRequest` client for external loyalty card REST services.

**Synchronous — External (SOAP/WCF)**
- `RSService.cs` integrates with three Georgian government ASMX services via WCF `BasicHttpBinding` (configured in `app.config`):
  - `https://www.revenue.mof.ge/ntosservice/ntosservice.asmx` — Income Tax Online Service (RSServiceReference)
  - `https://webserv.rs.ge/specinvoices/SpecInvoicesService.asmx` — Special Invoice Service (NsafServiceReference)
  - `https://services.rs.ge/WayBillService/WayBillService.asmx` — Electronic Waybill Service (WaybillServiceReference)
- All bindings use `Transport` security (HTTPS) with no client credentials.

**Asynchronous — Sync/Background**
- `ipmSync\SyncModule.cs` — polling-based FTP sync (reading import files from FTP server, sending export via FTP).
- `ipmSync\MailClient.cs` — POP3 mail-based data sync using `OpenPop.dll`.
- `MainForm` uses a background `Thread` (`m_web_sync`) for web synchronization.
- `System.Timers.Timer` used in `MainForm` for license re-check (`_licTimer`, `_bogTimer`) and in various forms (BOG data polling, café shift timers).
- `Task.Run` / `async/await` used in `ApiInvoker.cs` and `LicenseManager.cs` for non-blocking HTTP calls.

**External API Endpoints (constants in `APIEndpoints.cs`)**
- `https://api.mobileo.ge` — eMenu restaurant tablet ordering (SMOS)
- `https://{0}.elcoapp.com` — Elco loyalty card system
- `https://api9.pensions.ge` — Georgian Pension Agency
- `http://127.0.0.1:1331` — WebKassa local fiscal device
- `http://127.0.0.1:8080` — MultiKassa local fiscal device
- `https://backup.fina.ge` — Cloud backup redirect
- `https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/oauth2/v2.0` — OneDrive OAuth2
- `http://license.fina.ge:64270` — FINA license server
- `https://nbg.gov.ge/gw/api/ct/monetarypolicy/currencies/` — National Bank of Georgia currency rates

**WebSocket**
- `WebSocketSharpHelper.cs` (`ipmCashierPrinter\Tinda\`) — used to communicate with Tinda fiscal printer over WebSocket (`websocket-sharp-standard`).

**External Process Invocation**
- `POSRegister.cs` (`ipmCashierPrinter`) launches an external helper executable `Tools\POSManager\POSManager.exe` for POS terminal card operations, communicating via Base64-encoded JSON on stdin/stdout.

### 4.4 Data Storage & Access

**Primary: Microsoft SQL Server**
- All business data is stored in a single SQL Server database selected at login via `ipmDatabaseGenerater`.
- The connection string is stored in `StaticFields.ConnectionString` (populated from Windows Registry: `Software\FINA\Settings`).
- **No ORM is used**. All queries are raw `SqlCommand` invocations within `DBContext.cs` and `DataManager.cs`.
- `DBContext` (`ipmPMBasic\DBContext.cs`) provides `ExecuteSql`, `GetTableData`, `GetScalar<T>`, `GetDictionary<K,V>`, and async equivalents.
- `DataManager.cs` extends `DBContext` with domain-specific query methods.
- **Transactions**: `TransactionScope` with `IsolationLevel.ReadCommitted`, timeout up to 10 minutes, used throughout `BusinesContext.cs` for all write operations.
- SQL timeout is set to **1200 seconds** by default (`DBContext.Timeout = 1200`).
- Database schema uses named schemas: `book.*` (master data tables), `doc.*` (document tables), `config.*` (configuration tables).

**Secondary: MySQL (Optional Web Sync)**
- `MySqlDataManager.cs` (`ipmPMBasic`) — connects to a remote MySQL database for web/mobile data sync. Enabled only when configured with server/database/uid/password via `GetProgramManager().GetConfigParamValue(...)`.

**Registry-based Configuration**
- Windows Registry (`HKCU\Software\FINA\Settings`) stores the encrypted product license key, hardware ID, and connection settings.

**Migration Strategy**
- Schema upgrades are performed by `ipmDatabaseGenerater` (`DataBaseSettings.cs`, `DatabasesService.cs`), which applies incremental SQL scripts at startup/login. No Entity Framework migrations are used.

---

## 5. Design Patterns

### Creational Patterns

| Pattern | Location | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **Singleton (static class)** | `StaticFields.cs` (`ipmStaticHelper`) | Global mutable state container — `StaticFields.ConnectionString`, `StaticFields.UserId`, etc. are static properties accessed throughout the entire application. |
| **Singleton (Settings)** | Every `Properties\Settings.Designer.cs` (e.g., `ipmAccesses`, `ipmSync`) | `ApplicationSettingsBase.Synchronized(new Settings())` yields a thread-safe static singleton per project. |
| **Factory Method (implicit)** | `DBContext` constructors | `new DBContext()` uses `StaticFields.ConnectionString`; `new DBContext(connectionString)` is the parameterized overload — callers select which "factory" to use. |

### Structural Patterns

| Pattern | Location | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **Facade** | `ProgramManagerBasic.cs` | Provides a single unified interface (`GetDataManager()`, `GetTranslatorManager()`, `GetCurrencyManager()`, `GetRSService()`, etc.) to all sub-systems; `MainForm` and all child forms interact with the whole system exclusively through this facade. |
| **Facade** | `ApiInvoker.cs` | Hides all HTTP transport details (HttpClient lifecycle, headers, serialization) behind `InvokeRequest<T>` / `InvokeRequestAsync<T>`. |
| **Adapter** | `POSRegister.cs` | Adapts POS terminal hardware protocols (Daisy, Datec, Tinda, WebKassa, MultiKassa) to a single `MakeOperation` method signature by launching an external process. |
| **Composite** | Account tree (`AccountManagerForm.cs`, `AccountGroupForm.cs`) | Chart of accounts is a composite tree structure with groups containing sub-groups and leaf accounts, rendered in a `TreeView`. |

### Behavioral Patterns

| Pattern | Location | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **Observer (Events)** | `ProgramManagerBasic.cs` → `MainForm.cs` | `ProgramManager` exposes `OnShowListForm` and `OnShowOtherForm` `EventHandler` events; `MainForm` subscribes and opens the appropriate MDI child form. |
| **Observer (Events)** | All Windows Forms | Standard WinForms event-subscription pattern (`button.Click += new EventHandler(...)`) used pervasively throughout all UI forms. |
| **Strategy** | `DataManager` / `MySqlDataManager` | Two data access strategies: primary SQL Server (`DataManager`) and optional MySQL web sync (`MySqlDataManager`). `ProgramManagerBasic` holds both and switches at runtime based on configuration. |
| **Strategy** | `ExcelManager.cs` | `DataMode` enum selects between `DataGridView`-based and `DataTable`-based Excel export strategies. |
| **Strategy** | `POSRegister.cs` + `CashRegister.cs` | `TerminalProtocol` enum selects the hardware communication strategy (Daisy, Datec, WebKassa, MultiKassa, Tinda) without changing the calling code. |
| **Template Method** | `ipmBaseDocForm`, `ipmBaseViewForm`, `ipmBaseElementForm` (`ipmElementList`) | Base form classes define the skeleton of document/list/element form behaviour; derived forms in `ipmDocs`, `ipmViews`, and `ipmElementForms` override specific steps. |
| **Command** | `DocTypes` enum + document forms | Each document type (`DocTypes.ProductIn`, `DocTypes.CustomerOrder`, etc.) maps to a dedicated form that encapsulates the complete create/edit/delete operation for that business command. |

### Infrastructure Patterns

| Pattern | Location | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **Repository (informal)** | `DataManager.cs` / `DBContext.cs` | `DataManager` acts as the repository; `DBContext` is the unit of data access. Not formally interface-based, but functionally equivalent — all data access flows through these two classes. |
| **Unit of Work** | `BusinesContext.cs` (`ipmBLogic`) | `BusinesContext` wraps a `DBContext` and uses `TransactionScope` to batch multiple SQL operations into a single atomic unit. `dispose` is properly implemented. |
| **Retry (manual)** | `LicenseManager.cs` | `CheckLicBackgroundAsync` retries the license check HTTP call up to 5 times with a 5-second delay, with a single attempt if no internet is detected. |

### DDD-Aligned Patterns

| Pattern | Location | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **Domain Model classes** | `ipmPMBasic\Models\` | ~150+ model files: `book.*` (master data), `doc.*` (transactional documents), `config.*` (configuration). Each is a plain C# class (POCO), decorated with `[JsonProperty]` and `[Description]` attributes for serialization and SQL mapping. |
| **Value Objects (implicit)** | `ProductsFlowParam`, `ProductRestInfo` | Immutable-ish parameter objects used to carry operation parameters between layers. |
| **Domain Service** | `RSService.cs` | Encapsulates all interaction with the Georgian Revenue Service as a domain-level service, completely isolated from UI and data access. |
| **Anti-Corruption Layer** | `RSService.cs`, `ApiInvoker.cs`, `ServiceRESTManager.cs` | Each external system integration wraps the foreign API in its own translation layer, preventing external contracts from leaking into domain logic. |

---

## 6. API Surface

This is a **desktop client application** with no inbound HTTP API surface of its own. The application consumes the following external APIs:

### Outbound SOAP (WCF) Endpoints Consumed

| Service | Endpoint URL | Contract Interface |
|---|---|---|
| Georgian Income Tax (NTOS) | `https://www.revenue.mof.ge/ntosservice/ntosservice.asmx` | `RSServiceReference.NtosServiceSoapClient` |
| NSAF Special Invoices | `https://webserv.rs.ge/specinvoices/SpecInvoicesService.asmx` | `NsafServiceReference.SpecInvoicesServiceSoapClient` |
| RS.ge Waybill Service | `https://services.rs.ge/WayBillService/WayBillService.asmx` | `WaybillServiceReference.WayBillsSoapClient` |

### Outbound REST Endpoints Consumed

| Service | Base URL | Used In |
|---|---|---|
| FINA License Server | `http://license.fina.ge:64270/LicenseService/LicenseService.svc/` | `LicenseManager.cs` |
| National Bank of Georgia Currency API | `https://nbg.gov.ge/gw/api/ct/monetarypolicy/currencies/` | `CurrencyManager.cs` |
| Georgian Pension Agency | `https://api9.pensions.ge` | `PensionAgencyHelper.cs` |
| eMenu / Mobileo (SMOS) | `https://api.mobileo.ge` | `ipmExtraFunctions` SMOS integration |
| Elco Loyalty App | `https://{subdomain}.elcoapp.com` | `ElcoCardModels.cs`, `ApiInvoker` |
| Cloud Backup | `https://backup.fina.ge` | `ipmExtraFunctions\CloudBackup` |
| OneDrive OAuth2 | `https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/oauth2/v2.0` | OneDrive backup integration |
| Local WebKassa Fiscal | `http://127.0.0.1:1331` | `ipmCashierPrinter\WebKassa` |
| Local MultiKassa Fiscal | `http://127.0.0.1:8080` | `ipmCashierPrinter\MultiKassa` |
| Elpharmacy | `ApiInvoker` + endpoints from `book.ElPharmacy*` models | `ElPharmacyApi.cs` |
| BOG (Bank of Georgia) Data | Via `ipmExtraFunctions\BogDataCollection` | BOG bank statement integration |
| SpaceBank / UniPay | `ipmExtraFunctions\SpaceBankForm`, `UniPayForm` | Payment gateway integrations |

### Internal Local Service Consumer

| Component | Target | Protocol |
|---|---|---|
| `ServiceRESTManager.cs` | `http://{IP}:{Port}/{ServName}/DataService.svc/` | REST over HTTP — local POS service |
| `POSRegister.cs` | `Tools\POSManager\POSManager.exe` | Inter-process (stdout Base64 JSON) |
| `WebSocketSharpHelper.cs` | Tinda fiscal device on local WebSocket | WebSocket |

---

## 7. Configuration & Secrets Management

### Configuration Sources (in priority order)

1. **Windows Registry** (`HKCU\Software\FINA\Settings`):
   - Stores the encrypted product license key (`EncryptedKey`), hardware ID binding, and connection configuration.
   - Manipulated in `LicenseManager.cs` (`ClearRegeditLic`, `GetPcLicenseResponse`).
   - Risk: Registry values b/c/d/e/f/p in `Software\FINA\Settings` hold license data.

2. **SQL Server database table** `config.*`:
   - Runtime configuration (`ConfigParams` dictionary in `ProgramManagerBasic`) is loaded from the database at startup via `DataManager.GetTableDictionary(...)`.
   - Includes parameters like `RSUserID`, `RSUnId`, `ExternalCardIP`, `ExternalCardPort`, `ExternalServName`, `WebImageExt`, `RSPerUser`, and dozens of feature flags.

3. **`app.config`** (`FINA\app.config`):
   - WCF `<system.serviceModel>` bindings for RS.ge SOAP services.
   - `<appSettings>`: `BackupRestrictMode` flag.
   - `<userSettings>`: UI language preference (`FINA.Properties.Settings/Language`).
   - `<system.transactions>`: default timeout 59 minutes.
   - `<startup>` targets `.NETFramework,Version=v4.8`.

4. **`StaticFields` static class** (`ipmStaticHelper\StaticFields.cs`):
   - In-memory global state: `ConnectionString`, `UserId`, `HardwareId`, `EncryptedKey`, `LocalConnectedIP`, `GlobalConnectedIP`, `PosId`, `POSSyncUrl`, `BackupRestrictMode`, `IsSyncEnabled`, `IsCafeLocalSettings`.
   - Values are populated at startup by `ProgramManager` and the login/database-selection dialogs.

### Secrets Handling

- The product license key is stored **encrypted in the Windows Registry** using a custom AES-256-CBC implementation (`CryptoSecurityCore.cs` / `CryptoSecurityInternal.cs`).
- The FINA license server communication additionally wraps keys with `CryptoSecurityInternal.Encrypt` before transmission.
- SQL Server connection strings are constructed from DB selection at login and held in memory via `StaticFields.ConnectionString` — they are **not written to a file**.
- RS.ge web service username/password (`m_su`, `m_sp`) are stored encrypted in the database table `book.RSUsers` and loaded per-user.
- Hardware identification uses WMI (`WMI.cs`) to generate a machine fingerprint (`StaticFields.HardwareId`).
- **No `.env` files, no `appsettings.json`, no Docker secrets, no Azure Key Vault** — this is a traditional Windows desktop application.

---

## 8. Deployment & Infrastructure

### Build

- **Visual Studio 2022** (VisualStudioVersion 17.0.32112.339) is the required IDE.
- Solution builds with MSBuild (ToolsVersion 12.0 project format, targeting .NET 4.8).
- Three build configurations: `Debug|AnyCPU`, `Debug|x64`, `Release|AnyCPU`, `Release|x64`, `Release|x86`.
- The `LangVersion` is set to `7.3` in the x64 configurations.
- All third-party assemblies are pre-compiled and checked in under `DLL/` — no NuGet package restore is used; dependencies are managed as file references.

### Deployment

- **Desktop installation** on end-user Windows machines.
- The entry point executable is `FINA.exe` (built from the `Test2\FINA.csproj` project).
- A companion external process `Tools\POSManager\POSManager.exe` must be co-deployed for POS terminal operations (`POSRegister.cs`).
- A companion background service `FINALocalBridge` is expected to be running; `Program.cs` calls `StaticFuncs.TerminateProcess("FINALocalBridge")` on application exit.
- The application requires a network-accessible SQL Server instance that it can connect to directly.

### Environments

- **Could not be determined from the codebase** — no environment-specific configuration files, no `appsettings.{environment}.json`, no CI/CD pipeline, no environment variables. Development vs production is differentiated only by the chosen SQL Server database and the registry key settings on the local machine.

### Containerization / Cloud Infrastructure

- **None detected.** No Dockerfile, docker-compose, Kubernetes manifests, Terraform, Bicep, ARM templates, or Helm charts are present in the workspace.

### CI/CD Pipeline

- **None detected.** No `.github/workflows`, `azure-pipelines.yml`, `Jenkinsfile`, or equivalent pipeline configuration files are present.

### Source Control Metadata

- Projects contain `<SccProjectName>SAK</SccProjectName>` entries suggesting historical use of a SourceSafe-compatible SCC provider (Microsoft Visual SourceSafe or similar legacy system), but no modern VCS configuration files (`.gitignore`, `.git/`) were found under the analyzed workspace root.

---

## 9. Testing Strategy

- **No test projects were found** in the solution (`WareHouseMain.sln`).
- No xUnit, NUnit, MSTest, or any other test framework references were found in any `.csproj`.
- No mocking libraries (Moq, NSubstitute, FakeItEasy) are referenced anywhere.
- No code coverage tools are configured.
- Testing appears to be entirely manual / ad-hoc. A `TestForm.cs` exists in the main `FINA` project (`iPoint Modules\Test2\TestForm.cs`) — this is a WinForms scratch form used for developer testing, not a formal test suite.

---

## 10. Key Dependencies

| Library | Version | Location | Purpose in This Project |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Newtonsoft.Json** | 6.0.0.0 | `DLL\Newtonsoft.Json.dll` | JSON serialization for all REST API communication, model serialization (`[JsonProperty]` decorators on all model classes), and POS sync data exchange. |
| **MySql.Data** | (unversioned DLL) | `DLL\MySql.Data.dll` | MySQL client driver for optional web/mobile sync via `MySqlDataManager.cs`. |
| **BouncyCastle.Crypto** | 1.8.1.0 | `DLL\BouncyCastle.Crypto.dll` | Additional cryptographic operations used in `ipmExtraFunctions`, `ipmSuperMarket`, `ipmCafe`. |
| **Microsoft.Office.Interop.Excel** | 15.0.0.0 | `DLL\Microsoft.Office.Interop.Excel.dll` | COM Interop Excel automation used by `ExcelManager.cs` for data export to Excel files. |
| **Microsoft.Office.Interop.Word** | (COM) | `DLL\Microsoft.Office.Interop.Word.dll` | Word document generation (report printing via `AdvancedWordReport.cs` in `ipmReportGenerator`). |
| **SpreadsheetGear** | 6.0.3.151 | `DLL\SpreadsheetGear.dll` | Server-side Excel report generation without requiring Office installation; used in `ipmReportGenerator`, `ipmCafe`, `ipmSuperMarket`, `ipmProductOut_ZedDoc`. |
| **Ionic.Zip** | (unversioned DLL) | `DLL\Ionic.Zip.dll` | ZIP archive creation/extraction in `ipmExtraFunctions` (cloud backup, archive operations). |
| **ICSharpCode.SharpZipLib** | 0.85.5.452 | `DLL\ICSharpCode.SharpZipLib.dll` | Additional ZIP/compression support in `ipmPMBasic`. |
| **Zen.Barcode.Core** | 3.1.0.0 | `DLL\Zen.Barcode.Core.dll` | Barcode image generation (product labels, receipt barcodes) in `ipmSuperMarket`, `ipmCafe`, and `ipmCashierPrinter`. |
| **websocket-sharp-standard** | (unversioned DLL) | `DLL\websocket-sharp-standard.dll` | WebSocket client for Tinda fiscal printer communication (`ipmCashierPrinter\Tinda\WebSocketSharpHelper.cs`). |
| **Renci.SshNet** | (unversioned DLL) | `DLL\Renci.SshNet.dll` | SFTP/SSH client for secure file transfer in `AdditionalAdvancedProjects`. |
| **OpenPop** | 2.0.4.369 | `DLL\OpenPop.dll` | POP3 email parsing in `ipmSync\MailClient.cs` — used for mail-based data synchronization. |
| **PdfLib** | (custom DLL) | `DLL\PdfLib.dll` | PDF generation for reports and documents; appears to be a proprietary library. |
| **Excel (ExcelDataReader)** | 2.0.1.0 | `DLL\Excel.dll` | Reading Excel files (product imports, price imports); referenced in `ipmPMBasic`. |

---

## 11. Notable Implementation Details

### 1. Multi-Language / Multi-Region Support
`TranslatorManager.cs` (`ipmPMBasic`) loads all UI string translations from the SQL database at startup and caches them in `Hashtable[] langs_table`. Supports 10 languages: Georgian, Russian, English, Azerbaijani, Turkish, Ukrainian, Latvian, Armenian, Belarusian, Kazakh. The current language is stored at `FINA.Properties.Settings/Language` in user settings. The system is not localized via standard .NET resource files but via live DB queries — enabling in-app customization of all labels.

### 2. Georgian Government Integration Depth
The system is tightly integrated with Georgian fiscal authorities. `RSService.cs` manages electronic waybills (creation, activation, cancellation), special invoices (NSAF), and income tax declarations. The `WaybillMode` enum (`CreateActivate`, `Close`, `Cancel`) drives state-machine-like waybill lifecycle management. Georgian Lari (GEL) exchange rates are fetched live from the National Bank of Georgia API when not cached locally.

### 3. Multiple Edition Conditional Compilation
Three product editions are gated by compile-time constants in `Program.cs`, `MainForm.cs`, and `ProgramManagerBasic.cs`:
- `_FREE_VERSION` — Limited free tier
- `_EXPORT_VERSION` — Export-focused edition
- `_FINA24_VERSION` — FINA 2024 cloud-connected edition
The edition determines which menu items and modules are loaded, what the ProgramVersion enum value is, and what registry paths are used for licensing.

### 4. Hardware License Binding (Anti-Piracy)
`LicenseManager.cs` combines an encrypted product key (stored in Registry) with a WMI-derived machine hardware fingerprint (`WMI.cs`, `FinaKeyGenerator.cs`) to produce a bound license. The license is validated against `license.fina.ge:64270` via a REST POST. The background check (`CheckLicBackgroundAsync`) runs periodically (`_licTimer` in `MainForm`) and retries up to 5 times before accepting failure.

### 5. Time Manipulation Protection
`StaticFuncs.GetOnlineDatetime()` queries both `time.windows.com` (NTP/UDP port 123) and `time.nist.gov` (TCP port 13) to get an authoritative timestamp, preventing users from manipulating the system clock to extend trial or demo periods.

### 6. WPF Island in a WinForms Application
`ipmWarehouse\SheduleDraw.xaml` / `SheduleDraw.xaml.cs` is a WPF `UserControl` embedded within the WinForms `ipmWarehouse` module — the only WPF/XAML file in the entire solution. It is hosted using `ElementHost` for rendering the warehouse schedule/gantt chart.

### 7. POS Terminal External-Process Architecture
Rather than coupling POS terminal protocols into the main process, `POSRegister.cs` spawns `Tools\POSManager\POSManager.exe` as a child process, serializes the operation request to Base64 JSON as a command-line argument, and reads the response from stdout. This cleanly isolates POS protocol COM/serial communication from the main application.

### 8. FTP-Based Data Synchronization
`ipmSync\FtpProcess.cs`, `SyncModule.cs`, and `ZippingFiles.cs` implement a file-based sync mechanism. Compressed data files are uploaded/downloaded from an FTP server. This supports offline POS terminals (e.g., supermarket branches) that sync back to the head office database periodically. The sync sentinel characters (`■`, `□`, `^`, `◊`) used in `SyncModule.cs` suggest a custom text protocol for the sync file format.

### 9. SQL Timeout and Long-Running Operations
The default `DBContext.Timeout` is set to **1200 seconds (20 minutes)**, and `BusinesContext.cs` uses `TransactionScope` with timeouts ranging from 3 to 10 minutes. The `app.config` sets `<defaultSettings timeout="00:59:00"/>` for distributed transactions. This reflects the scale of some batch operations (e.g., FIFO self-cost recalculation, inventory recalculation) that operate over millions of rows.

### 10. FIFO and Average Cost Accounting Methods
`ipmExtraFunctions` contains `RecalculateFIFOSelfCost.cs` and `RecalculateAVGSelfCost.cs` — dedicated forms/operations for full recalculation of product self-cost using FIFO and weighted-average cost methods. This is a core accounting feature for inventory valuation. The `doc.ProductsFlowFIFO.cs` model in `ipmPMBasic\Models\` supports the FIFO flow data structure separately from the standard flow.

### 11. Approval Workflow
`ipmAccesses\ApprovalsForm.cs` and `ApprovalDocsListForm.cs` implement a document approval workflow. Documents can be submitted for approval and routed to approvers defined in the `book.UserPermissions` and role configuration tables. This is a basic multi-step approval lifecycle without a dedicated workflow engine.

### 12. Embedded Georgian Language Strings
Throughout the codebase, literals in Georgian script (Unicode) appear directly in `.cs` source files (e.g., `string single_str = "საცალო გაყიდვების ტრანზიტული ანგარიში"` in `SyncModule.cs`). This occurs for fallback strings and default values where the translation system is not yet applied. Files are saved in UTF-16 LE encoding (BOM `0xFFFE` detected in binary reads of several `.cs` files).
